title: Minuopsis michauxii
taxonomy: Minuopsis michauxii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to the southeastern United States. The classification of Minuopsis michauxii is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, the phylum Magnoliophyta, the class Magnoliopsida, the order Gentianales, and the family Gentianaceae. This species is further divided into the genus Minuopsis and the species M. michauxii. The classification of Minuopsis michauxii is still being researched and may be subject to change.
